message:
🌱 Add vllm: [Feature]: Support rerank models mission (#848)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vllm-6928-feature-support-rerank-models",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vllm: Support rerank models",
+    "description": "Add support for rerank (cross-encoder) models in vLLM, enabling high-throughput reranking for RAG workflows. Rerank models like jina-reranker-v2 and bge-reranker are essential for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines. Requested by 35+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vLLM setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vLLM version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n# or\npython -c \"import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)\"\n```\nRerank model support requires a recent version of vLLM."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand rerank models in vLLM",
+        "description": "Rerank models are cross-encoder models that score query-document pairs for relevance. They are critical in RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) workflows for re-ordering retrieved documents before passing them to an LLM.\n\nvLLM added support for serving rerank models like jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual, which uses a RoBERTa-based architecture."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Serve a rerank model with vLLM",
+        "description": "Start the vLLM server with a rerank model:\n```bash\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual \\\n  --task score\n```\nThe `--task score` flag tells vLLM to serve the model as a scoring/reranking endpoint rather than a text generation endpoint."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify reranking works",
+        "description": "Test the reranking endpoint:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/v1/score \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual\", \"query\": \"What is machine learning?\", \"documents\": [\"ML is a subset of AI\", \"The weather is sunny today\"]}'\n```\nThe response should contain relevance scores for each query-document pair."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vLLM added support for rerank (cross-encoder) models by recognizing model architectures like jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual (RoBERTa-based) and exposing a scoring endpoint. This enables high-throughput reranking in RAG pipelines using vLLM's serving infrastructure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Serve a rerank model\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual \\\n  --task score",
+        "# Query the reranking endpoint\ncurl http://localhost:8000/v1/score \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual\", \"query\": \"What is ML?\", \"documents\": [\"ML is AI\", \"Weather is sunny\"]}'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vllm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature",
+      "rerank",
+      "rag",
+      "cross-encoder"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vllm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/6928",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/15876"
+    },
+    "reactions": 35,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "python",
+      "pip"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU, and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:45:15.100Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
